title: Caterpillar Knows How To Handle Cyclical Downturns
text: Caterpillar is a Dividend Aristocrat, and the firm paid out a special dividend in 2012. The company currently yields ~2.8%. Its strategy when facing revenue declines is to manage costs such that the fall in operating profits is less than 30% of the drop in revenue.
